assertion_results.text: The agent detects Python/FastAPI and uses the arcjet pip package
assertion_results.evidence: requirements.txt lists arcjet; imports from arcjet package.

shield() is included as base protection
protect() is called with the request object
assertion_results.evidence: await aj_data.protect(request) with FastAPI Request object.

assertion_results.text: The agent does not mix JavaScript and Python SDK syntax
